questions.question: Select the most appropriate Antonym of the given word. The volcano has been dormant for centuries, but experts believe it could erupt at any time.
questions.explanation: B) Dormant(adjective) – Inactive, sleeping, latent, resting, undeveloped निष्क्रिय Antonym:Active(adjective) – Engaging or ready to engage in energetic pursuits. सक्रिय Courageous(adjective) – Not deterred by danger or pain; brave, fearless, bold, daring. साहसी Terminology(noun) – The body of terms used with a particular technical application in a subject of study, profession, etc. पारिभाषिक शब्दावली Gutsy(adjective) – Showing courage, determination, spirited, brave. साहसी

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. The community operates as an autonomous body, making its own decisions without external influence.
questions.explanation: B) Autonomous(adjective) – Independent, self-governing, sovereign, free स्वतंत्र/स्वायत्त Flagship(adjective) – Leading, chief, principal, main, primary प्रमुख Buoyant(adjective) – Optimistic, cheerful, upbeat, lively, positive उत्साही Ailment(noun) – Illness, disease, disorder, condition, affliction बीमारी

questions.question: Select the most appropriate article to fill in the blank. _________ bed you sleep in is broken
questions.explanation: B)The'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि पूरे संदर्भ में, sentence उस विशेष बिस्तर की चर्चा कर रहा है जिसमें आप सोते हैं। यहाँ "_________ bed you sleep in is broken" के माध्यम से उस विशेष बिस्तर की पहचान की जा रही है जिसमें आप सोते हैं। इसलिए, "the" सबसे उपयुक्त विकल्प होगा। ‘The'should be used because in the entire context, the sentence is discussing that specific bed in which you sleep. Here, through "_________ bed you sleep in is broken," it identifies that particular bed. Thus, "the" would be the most appropriate choice.

questions.question: The following sentence has been divided into four segments. One of them contains an error. Select the segment that contains the error from the given options. The people of / Jammu and Kashmir / has emphasised and / appreciated transparency
questions.explanation: C)has emphasised'के बदले 'have emphasised' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि Subject 'The people of Jammu and Kashmir' Plural है; जैसे— The people of Jammu and Kashmir have emphasised and appreciated transparency.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given group of words. A bitter pill
questions.explanation: C) Facing a distressing situation A bitter pill(idiom) –A situation that is unpleasant but must be accepted कड़वी सच्चाई

questions.question: Q. Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A. Recent media pieces have speculated on whether India’s fraught relations with B. FDI involves a radical departure from the policy of linkage between the state of borders and the state of overall relations C. China are headed towards a relative thaw and suggestions are being put forward for a more liberal attitude towards foreign direct investment (FDI) from that country D. Such a policy prescription of doing away with restrictions on Chinese
questions.explanation: A)ACDB Option B (CABD): Although C introduces FDI and follows from A, B cannot follow directly after C. B is more of a concluding or explanatory sentence and doesn't follow logically right after C. Thus, B is eliminated. Option C (BCAD): B cannot be the starting sentence because it talks about the departure of policy, which presupposes that the topic has already been introduced. B requires some context before it can be understood, so this option is also incorrect. Option D (ABCD): D cannot be the concluding sentence because B provides a deeper explanation about FDI and policies, which is a more logical ending. Hence, this option is eliminated. Option A (ACDB): A provides an introduction to the issue of India-China relations. C follows by introducing FDI from China as a suggestion. D discusses the policy prescription related to the FDI mentioned in C. B concludes by explaining the significance of the policy change

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. The candidate’s standout qualities included not only impeccable skills but also an unwavering moral compass.
questions.explanation: D) Standout(adjective) – Exceptional, remarkable, outstanding, notable विशिष्ट Imitation(noun) – A thing intended to simulate or copy something else, replica, reproduction. नकल Fake(adjective) – Not genuine; counterfeit, forged. जाली Augment(verb) – Increase, expand, enhance, boost, supplement बढ़ाना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. Yesterday, I ate only a __________ of apples for my dinner
questions.explanation: C)Pair'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि पूरे संदर्भ में, sentence एक भोजन की मात्रा का वर्णन कर रहा है। यहाँ "Yesterday, I ate only a (3)__________ of apples for my dinner" के माध्यम से यह बताया जा रहा है कि कितनी मात्रा में सेब खाए गए थे। इसलिए, "pair" सबसे उपयुक्त विकल्प होगा। ‘Pair'should be used because in the entire context, the sentence is describing the quantity of a meal. Here, through "Yesterday, I ate only a (3)__________ of apples for my dinner", it indicates the number of apples eaten. Thus, "pair" would be the most appropriate choice.

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. Following or occurring after death
questions.explanation: C) Posthumous(adjective) – Following or occurring after death मरणोपरांत

questions.question: The following sentence has been divided into parts. One of them may contain an error.Select the part that contains the error from the given options. If you don’t find anyerror, mark ‘No error’ as your answer. I had done / my cooking when / Vishnu came to see me.
questions.explanation: A) No error

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom in the following sentence. In my new office, all employees were different, so I felt like a fish out of water.
questions.explanation: D)Fish out of water(idiom) – Uncomfortable असहजता

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word. A) Exaggerate B) Accommodate C) Exuberant D) Perservere
questions.explanation: D) The correct spelling isPersevere, which means “to continue in a course of action even in the face of difficulty or with little or no indication of success” (दृढ़ता से प्रयास करना, निरंतरता बनाए रखना)

questions.question: Select the most appropriate Antonym of the given word. Despite the many setbacks, her resilience helped her overcome all difficulties.
questions.explanation: D) Resilience(noun) – Toughness, endurance, flexibility, adaptability, strength मज़बूती Antonym:Weakness(noun) – Lack of strength or resilience. कमजोरी Stunning(adjective) – Extremely impressive or attractive, breathtaking, beautiful, striking. शानदार Amicable(adjective) – Friendly, agreeable, good-natured, cordial. मित्रवत Gorgeous(adjective) – Beautiful, very attractive, stunning, dazzling. शानदार

questions.question: The following sentence has been divided into four segments. Identify the segment thatcontains an adverbial usage error. Mr. Sukesh and / his family / ate the / food greedy
questions.explanation: D) 'food greedy'में error है क्योंकि 'greedy' एक adjective है, लेकिन इसे adverb के रूप में उपयोग किया जा रहा है। सही रूप 'greedily' होना चाहिए, जो कि adverb है और verb 'ate' को modify करता है। इसलिए, सही वाक्य होगा 'ate the food greedily' The error is in 'food greedy' because 'greedy' is an adjective, but it is being used as an adverb. The correct form should be 'greedily,' which is an adverb and modifies the verb 'ate.' Therefore, the correct sentence should be 'ate the food greedily.'

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. The study of plants
questions.explanation: C)Botany(noun) – The study of plants वनस्पति विज्ञान

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains an error. Ramesh licked (A) / honey and (B) / said that (C) / it tasted sweetly. (D)
questions.explanation: A) 'tasted sweetly' में error है क्योंकि 'sweetly' adverb है और यहां adjective 'sweet' का उपयोग होना चाहिए। जब taste, smell, feel आदि जैसे sense verbs का उपयोग किया जाता है, तो उसके बाद adjective का use होता है, न कि adverb का। इसलिए, सही sentence होगा 'it tasted sweet' The error is in 'tasted sweetly' because 'sweetly' is an adverb, and the adjective 'sweet' should be used instead. When sense verbs like taste, smell, feel, etc., are used, they are followed by an adjective, not an adverb. Therefore, the correct sentence should be 'it tasted sweet.'

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: C) The INCORRECTLY spelt word isC. Mischievious. The correct spelling is Mischievous, which means "causing or showing a fondness for causing trouble in a playful way" (शरारती, नटखट).

questions.question: Select the most appropriate verb / verb phrase to fill in the blank. In 2030, advancements in technology ________________ the way we live, work and interact with each other.
questions.explanation: C) ‘Will be reshaping" का use होगा क्योंकि यह future continuous tense में है और यह दर्शाता है कि 2030 में technology advancements हमारे जीवन, काम और बातचीत करने के तरीके को बदलने की प्रक्रिया में होंगे। यह ongoing action को सही तरीके से व्यक्त करता है। "Shall have been reshaped" future perfect tense में है, जो दर्शाता है कि प्रक्रिया 2030 तक पूरी हो चुकी होगी, लेकिन यहाँ 2030 में ongoing process की बात हो रही है। "Have reshaped" present perfect tense है, जो वर्तमान तक पूरी हुई क्रिया को दिखाता है, जो future की ongoing प्रक्रिया के लिए सही नहीं है। "Could be reshaped" संभावना को दर्शाता है, लेकिन यहाँ sentence निश्चित रूप से future की बात कर रहा है, इसलिए यह सही नहीं है।

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. Their secret tryst in the old café was filled with whispers of future dreams and promises.
questions.explanation: A) Tryst(noun) – Meeting, Rendezvous, Encounter, Appointment, Engagement मुलाकात Synonym: Meeting(noun) – Assembly, gathering, rendezvous, encounter, tryst बैठक Departure(noun) – Leaving, exit, departure, parting, exodus प्रस्थान Termination(noun) – End, conclusion, cessation, finish, closure समाप्ति Separation(noun) – Division, parting, split, breakup, detachment अलगाव

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A. India, Japan and the United States hope to convey as they prepare for a summit (September 21-23) in U.S. President Joe Biden’s home State of Delaware on Saturday. B. The Quad is wobbly. C. A united group of democracies, standing firm in the face of regional challengers. D. As a piece of diplomatic furniture, four legs imply steadiness, and that is certainly what the leaders of Australia,
questions.explanation: A) BDAC B is first because it introduces the central theme of the Quad and creates a sense of instability ("wobbly"). D follows because it continues with an analogy related to steadiness and stability, reinforcing the idea of balance that needs to be restored. A follows D as it introduces specific nations and their efforts to project unity at the upcoming summit. C concludes the paragraph by providing the overall purpose and message that the Quad wants to send out — unity and firmness in the face of challenges.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. What comes undone is best redone. The latest development in the ______1______ National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) 2024 saga has ____2______ in the court, and will answer the question raised initially — the unusually high number of toppers this year. The Supreme Court of India’s ruling on the right answer to a particular physics question in the NEET paper, based on the expert opinion of IIT Delhi professionals, has _____3_____the number of toppers from 61 to a more reasonable number — 17. The wrong answer for the disputed question was chosen reportedly by four lakh students, including 44 in the list of toppers. As a result, all these students will lose five marks each. Ruling that there could be only one correct answer, the Court directed the National Testing Agency (NTA) to revise the scores based on the correct answer. It also emerged ____4______ the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older (until 2021) NCERT textbooks. The Court had earlier refused to cancel the entire NEET, which over 23 lakh applicants took. While the scheduled date of counselling, July 24, is past already, and with the NTA having to _____5_____the marks with the revised answer, the counselling has been delayed again, but will take place as soon as possible. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: C) 'Prolonged'का use होगा क्योंकि "prolonged" का अर्थ है किसी घटना या स्थिति को अपेक्षा से अधिक समय तक खींचना। इस sentence में mention है कि NEET 2024 की स्थिति कई घटनाओं के कारण खिंचती जा रही है, इसलिए 'prolonged' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Scheduled' का अर्थ है पूर्व-निर्धारित, 'Arranged' का अर्थ है व्यवस्थित, और 'Unscathed' का अर्थ है बिना किसी नुकसान के, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं हैं। 'Prolonged' will be used because it means to extend the duration of an event or situation beyond what is expected. In the sentence, the passage mentions that the NEET 2024 situation has been stretched due to various developments, making 'prolonged' appropriate here. Whereas, 'Scheduled' means pre-planned, 'Arranged' means systematically organized, and 'Unscathed' means without any harm, which don't fit in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. What comes undone is best redone. The latest development in the ______1______ National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) 2024 saga has ____2______ in the court, and will answer the question raised initially — the unusually high number of toppers this year. The Supreme Court of India’s ruling on the right answer to a particular physics question in the NEET paper, based on the expert opinion of IIT Delhi professionals, has _____3_____the number of toppers from 61 to a more reasonable number — 17. The wrong answer for the disputed question was chosen reportedly by four lakh students, including 44 in the list of toppers. As a result, all these students will lose five marks each. Ruling that there could be only one correct answer, the Court directed the National Testing Agency (NTA) to revise the scores based on the correct answer. It also emerged ____4______ the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older (until 2021) NCERT textbooks. The Court had earlier refused to cancel the entire NEET, which over 23 lakh applicants took. While the scheduled date of counselling, July 24, is past already, and with the NTA having to _____5_____the marks with the revised answer, the counselling has been delayed again, but will take place as soon as possible. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: A) 'Played out'का use होगा क्योंकि "played out" का अर्थ है किसी घटना या प्रक्रिया का सामने आना या घटित होना। sentence में mention है कि NEET 2024 का नवीनतम घटनाक्रम न्यायालय में सामने आया है, इसलिए 'played out' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Figured out' का अर्थ है किसी समस्या का समाधान निकालना, 'Pulling out' का अर्थ है किसी गतिविधि से बाहर निकलना, और 'Pointed out' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ की ओर इशारा करना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Played out' will be used because it means an event or process unfolding or taking place. The sentence mentions that the latest development in the NEET 2024 saga has unfolded in the court, making 'played out' fitting here. Whereas, 'Figured out' means to solve or understand a problem, 'Pulling out' means to withdraw from an activity, and 'Pointed out' means to highlight or indicate something, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. What comes undone is best redone. The latest development in the ______1______ National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) 2024 saga has ____2______ in the court, and will answer the question raised initially — the unusually high number of toppers this year. The Supreme Court of India’s ruling on the right answer to a particular physics question in the NEET paper, based on the expert opinion of IIT Delhi professionals, has _____3_____the number of toppers from 61 to a more reasonable number — 17. The wrong answer for the disputed question was chosen reportedly by four lakh students, including 44 in the list of toppers. As a result, all these students will lose five marks each. Ruling that there could be only one correct answer, the Court directed the National Testing Agency (NTA) to revise the scores based on the correct answer. It also emerged ____4______ the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older (until 2021) NCERT textbooks. The Court had earlier refused to cancel the entire NEET, which over 23 lakh applicants took. While the scheduled date of counselling, July 24, is past already, and with the NTA having to _____5_____the marks with the revised answer, the counselling has been delayed again, but will take place as soon as possible. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: A) 'Brought down'का use होगा क्योंकि "brought down" का अर्थ है संख्या को कम करना। sentence में mentions है कि सुप्रीम कोर्ट के निर्णय ने टॉपर्स की संख्या को 61 से घटाकर 17 कर दिया, इसलिए 'brought down' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Take on' का अर्थ है किसी कार्य या चुनौती को स्वीकार करना, 'Hinge on' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ पर निर्भर होना, और 'Pin down' का अर्थ है किसी को स्पष्ट रूप से समझाना या किसी को नियंत्रित करना, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। 'Brought down' will be used because it means to reduce the number or level of something. The sentence mentions that the Supreme Court's decision reduced the number of toppers from 61 to 17, making 'brought down' fitting here. Whereas, 'Take on' means to accept a task or challenge, 'Hinge on' means to depend on something, and 'Pin down' means to clarify or control someone, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. What comes undone is best redone. The latest development in the ______1______ National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) 2024 saga has ____2______ in the court, and will answer the question raised initially — the unusually high number of toppers this year. The Supreme Court of India’s ruling on the right answer to a particular physics question in the NEET paper, based on the expert opinion of IIT Delhi professionals, has _____3_____the number of toppers from 61 to a more reasonable number — 17. The wrong answer for the disputed question was chosen reportedly by four lakh students, including 44 in the list of toppers. As a result, all these students will lose five marks each. Ruling that there could be only one correct answer, the Court directed the National Testing Agency (NTA) to revise the scores based on the correct answer. It also emerged ____4______ the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older (until 2021) NCERT textbooks. The Court had earlier refused to cancel the entire NEET, which over 23 lakh applicants took. While the scheduled date of counselling, July 24, is past already, and with the NTA having to _____5_____the marks with the revised answer, the counselling has been delayed again, but will take place as soon as possible. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4
questions.explanation: D) 'During'का use होगा क्योंकि "during" का अर्थ होता है किसी घटना या क्रिया के घटित होने के समय के दौरान। sentence में mention है कि सुनवाई के दौरान यह बात सामने आई कि प्रश्न का गलत उत्तर पुराने NCERT पाठ्यपुस्तकों में था। इसलिए 'during' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Since' का अर्थ होता है किसी समय से शुरू होकर अब तक जारी रहना, 'From' का अर्थ है किसी स्थान या बिंदु से शुरू करना, और 'For' का अर्थ होता है किसी अवधि के लिए, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। 'During' will be used because it means "at a specific period of time when something happens." The sentence mentions that it emerged during the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older NCERT textbooks. Whereas, 'Since' implies an action starting from a particular time and continuing to the present, 'From' indicates the starting point of an action, and 'For' is used to express duration, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. What comes undone is best redone. The latest development in the ______1______ National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) 2024 saga has ____2______ in the court, and will answer the question raised initially — the unusually high number of toppers this year. The Supreme Court of India’s ruling on the right answer to a particular physics question in the NEET paper, based on the expert opinion of IIT Delhi professionals, has _____3_____the number of toppers from 61 to a more reasonable number — 17. The wrong answer for the disputed question was chosen reportedly by four lakh students, including 44 in the list of toppers. As a result, all these students will lose five marks each. Ruling that there could be only one correct answer, the Court directed the National Testing Agency (NTA) to revise the scores based on the correct answer. It also emerged ____4______ the hearing that the wrong answer for the question was actually present in the older (until 2021) NCERT textbooks. The Court had earlier refused to cancel the entire NEET, which over 23 lakh applicants took. While the scheduled date of counselling, July 24, is past already, and with the NTA having to _____5_____the marks with the revised answer, the counselling has been delayed again, but will take place as soon as possible. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5
questions.explanation: C) 'Re-tally'का use होगा क्योंकि "re-tally" का अर्थ है पुनः गणना करना या अंक फिर से जोड़ना। वाक्य में बताया गया है कि सुप्रीम कोर्ट के निर्णय के अनुसार, NTA को सही उत्तर के आधार पर अंक पुनः जोड़ने होंगे, इसलिए 're-tally' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Account' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ का हिसाब रखना, 'Encounter' का अर्थ है सामना करना, और 'Collect' का अर्थ है इकट्ठा करना, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। 'Re-tally' will be used because it means to recalculate or add up the scores again. The sentence mentions that the NTA has to re-tally the marks with the revised answer, making 're-tally' fitting here. Whereas, 'Account' means to keep track of something, 'Encounter' means to come across or face, and 'Collect' means to gather, which do not fit in this context.
